name: atelier
description: Browse local project artifacts, annotate figures and send precise feedback to Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Browse and annotate local project artifacts
interface.longDescription: Open a searchable local gallery for figures, PDFs, documents, code and media; send precise annotations to the active Codex task; and refresh regenerated artifacts without leaving the project workflow.
defaultPrompt: Wait for my next Atelier annotation
Apply my latest Atelier annotation and refresh the artifact
